sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GATX Corporation (NYSE:GATX) Increases Dividend to $0.66 Per Share
feed.summary: GATX Corporation (NYSE:GATX) recently declared an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.66 per share, an 8.2% raise from its previous dividend of $0.61. This marks the 15th consecutive year the company has increased its dividend, which is well-covered by earnings with a payout ratio of 25.4%. GATX also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates for EPS and revenue, and provided optimistic FY2026 EPS guidance, maintaining a consensus "Buy" rating from analysts.

feed.title: Galapagos Adds Industry Veteran Paulo Fontoura to Board as Independent Director
feed.summary: Galapagos has appointed Dr. Paulo Fontoura as a Non-Executive Independent Director, effective February 9, 2026, succeeding Dr. Susanne Schaffert. Dr. Fontoura brings extensive pharmaceutical leadership experience from Roche, and his appointment is expected to bolster Galapagos' strategic oversight as it advances innovative medicines and business development. Analysts currently rate GLPG stock as a Sell with a $22.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, assigns a Neutral rating due to challenging financial and operational landscapes despite a strong cash position.

feed.title: Green Plains CEO in BofA 2026 ag conference fireside chat
feed.summary: Green Plains Inc. announced that CEO Chris Osowski will participate in a fireside chat at the BofA Securities 2026 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on February 26. The company will also hold meetings with institutional investors. A live webcast and replay of the event will be available on Green Plains' investor relations website.

feed.title: Ellen Siminoff Sells 413 Shares of Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ:TTWO) Stock
feed.summary: Ellen Siminoff, a Director at Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ:TTWO), sold 413 shares of the company's stock on February 18th at an average price of $200, totaling $82,600. This transaction reduced her stake by 15.3% to 2,286 shares. The video game publisher's stock traded up 1.1% to $201.37, with a market cap of $37.29 billion, and analysts generally rate it as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target price of $283.94.

feed.title: Elizabeth Meloy Hepding Sells 18,246 Shares of Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Stock
feed.summary: Elizabeth Meloy Hepding, an insider at Ingersoll Rand, sold 18,246 shares of the company's stock for approximately $1.77 million, reducing her stake by over 52%. This transaction occurred despite Ingersoll Rand's strong Q4 earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations, and positive FY 2026 guidance. However, significant insider selling, including by EVP Vicente Reynal, has negatively impacted market sentiment.

feed.title: Sophie Vandebroek Sells 1,464 Shares of IDEXX Laboratories (NASDAQ:IDXX) Stock
feed.summary: Sophie Vandebroek, a director at IDEXX Laboratories (NASDAQ:IDXX), sold 1,464 shares for approximately $920,300, reducing her stake by 69.32%. This sale occurred on February 17th at an average price of $628.62 per share. The company recently reported quarterly EPS of $2.92, slightly missing consensus, with revenue of $1.09 billion and provided FY2026 EPS guidance between $14.29 and $14.80.

feed.title: Middle East Tensions Drive Oil Prices Up, Sending American Airlines, Delta, and JetBlue Fares Soaring – Are You Ready for the Price Hike?
feed.summary: Escalating tensions in the Middle East are causing oil prices to surge to a seven-month high, putting significant pressure on airline stocks like American Airlines, Delta, and JetBlue. This increase in fuel costs is threatening airline profit margins and operational expenses, potentially leading to higher ticket prices for consumers and creating a volatile environment for investors. Airlines are grappling with managing these rising costs amid geopolitical instability and other financial pressures while the market monitors the situation for further impacts on the industry's profitability and traveler demand.

feed.title: State Street Corporation Declares Dividends on its Common Stock and Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series “G,” “I,” “J,” and “K”
feed.summary: State Street Corporation announced quarterly cash dividends for its common stock and several series of non-cumulative perpetual preferred stock. Common shareholders will receive $0.84 per share, payable on April 13, 2026. Dividends were also declared for Series G, I, J, and K preferred stocks, with varying per share and depositary share amounts, all payable on March 16, 2026.

feed.title: Insider Sell: John Kober Sells Shares of MACOM Technology Soluti
feed.summary: John Kober, Senior Vice President and CFO of MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings Inc (MTSI), sold 7,196 shares of the company on February 17, 2026. This transaction brings his total ownership to 48,508 shares. The company's stock, trading at $243.07, is considered significantly overvalued based on its GuruFocus Value of $148.06, with a high price-to-earnings ratio compared to the industry median.

feed.title: BofA Reinstates Fair Isaac (FICO) Coverage With Buy Rating, $1,900 PT Citing Strong Pricing Power
feed.summary: Bank of America (BofA) has reinstated coverage of Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO) with a Buy rating and a $1,900 price target, citing the company’s strong pricing power and the growth potential of its Mortgage Direct Licensing program. This move is part of BofA's broader constructive outlook on the Information and Business Services sector, projecting healthy performance for 2026. Goldman Sachs also maintains a Buy rating, highlighting strong Q1 2026 results, upcoming price increases, and wider adoption of FICO 10T as drivers for future EPS growth.

feed.title: Commissioners approve 14-year extension for Mosaic's at Four Corners
feed.summary: Manatee County Commissioners have approved a 14-year extension to Mosaic's Master Mining Plan for its Four Corners Mine, a decision reached after a relatively uneventful hearing. The extension, which will allow mining until 2044 and reclamation until 2055, is expected to bring benefits such as reduced trucking traffic and expedited reclamation in certain areas. Despite some opposition due to environmental concerns, the commissioners voted 5-2 in favor, recognizing Mosaic's economic contributions and commitments to accelerated land reclamation.

feed.title: Vectra AI Highlights Gartner Research on Next-Generation NDR and AI-Driven Threats
feed.summary: Vectra AI is leveraging recent Gartner research on next-generation Network Detection and Response (NDR) to address the escalating threat of AI-driven cyberattacks. The company highlights the need for proactive, preemptive defense strategies and unified visibility across various environments. This strategic alignment with Gartner's insights aims to strengthen Vectra AI's competitive standing in the cybersecurity market, particularly for customers with complex hybrid infrastructures seeking machine-speed response and autonomous defense.

feed.title: Eli Lilly (LLY) Announces Positive Phase 3b Results for Taltz and Zepbound Combination Treatment in Psoriasis and Obesity
feed.summary: Eli Lilly announced positive Phase 3b results for the combination treatment of Taltz (ixekizumab) and Zepbound (tirzepatide) for adults with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis and obesity. The study showed that 27.1% of participants achieved both complete skin clearance and at least 10% weight loss with the combination, significantly outperforming Taltz alone. This marks Taltz as the first psoriatic biologic to successfully address psoriasis in conjunction with obesity using an incretin therapy, suggesting that treating obesity can improve psoriasis outcomes.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma brand adds 3 Naturepedic mattresses to sustainable home lineup
feed.summary: Naturepedic has partnered with Williams-Sonoma's sustainable home outlet, GreenRow, to offer three GOTS-certified organic mattresses. This partnership includes an exclusive Aurora mattress for GreenRow, as well as the Serenade hybrid and Naturepedic's organic crib mattress. GreenRow, launched in 2023, focuses on sustainable materials and manufacturing, reflecting growing consumer demand for transparent and healthier home products.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises Arista Networks (ANET) PT to $165 Following Q4 2025 Earnings Beat
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for Arista Networks (ANET) to $165 from $159, maintaining an Overweight rating, after the company's strong Q4 2025 earnings beat. This decision was influenced by a significant increase in deferred revenue and steady gross margin guidance despite memory market challenges, along with raised AI and growth targets. Another analyst, Amit Daryanani of Evercore ISI, also increased his price target to $200 with an Outperform rating, citing robust guidance and an increased 2026 revenue growth target.

feed.title: Citigroup Names New West Coast Leader for Private Banking Division
feed.summary: Citigroup has appointed Chad Reddy as the new market executive for its western private banking operations, underscoring its commitment to expanding its North American private banking presence. Reddy, a veteran in wealth management with 25 years of experience from Bank of America and Wells Fargo, will report to Chris Biotti, head of Citi Private Bank North America. This strategic hire aims to strengthen Citigroup's offerings in the region.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Linda Forry Sells Shares of Eversource Energy (ES)
feed.summary: Linda Forry, a Trustee at Eversource Energy (ES), sold 2,581 shares of the company on February 18, 2026, reducing her holdings to 11,506 shares. This transaction is part of a trend for Eversource Energy, which has seen 1 insider buy and 11 insider sells over the past year. With the stock trading at $73.06 and a GF Value of $66.29, it is considered modestly overvalued.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Rafael Flores Sells 1,600 Shares of Ameren Corp (AEE)
feed.summary: Rafael Flores, a Director at Ameren Services (a subsidiary of Ameren Corp), sold 1,600 shares of Ameren Corp (AEE) on February 17, 2026, reducing his holding to 13,953 shares. This transaction is part of a trend over the past year where Flores has sold 2,451 shares with no purchases, and the company has seen 22 insider sells with no buys. Ameren Corp's stock is currently trading at $111.52, classifying it as "modestly overvalued" according to its GF Value.

feed.title: Pomerantz Law Firm Announces the Filing of a Class Action Against Enphase Energy, Inc. and Certain Officers - ENPH
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. and certain officers on behalf of investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made materially false and misleading statements regarding its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate the impact of the 25D Credit termination, thereby overstating its financial prospects. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status.

feed.title: Dropbox Inc. (NASDAQ:DBX) Reports Narrow Q4 Beat Amid Investor Growth Concerns
feed.summary: Dropbox (NASDAQ:DBX) reported a narrow Q4 2025 beat on revenue and non-GAAP EPS, slightly exceeding analyst expectations. Despite positive financial performance including strong cash generation and share repurchases, the stock declined in after-hours trading due to investor concerns about slow revenue growth and the lack of immediate forward-looking guidance. The company is focusing on evolving its core business and accelerating the development of its AI-powered Dash product to drive future growth.

feed.title: Evergy: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Evergy Inc. reported a profit of $84.3 million, or 36 cents per share, in its fourth quarter, with adjusted earnings of 42 cents per share. The electric utility's revenue for the quarter was $1.34 billion, and for the full year, it reported a profit of $855.6 million, or $3.66 per share, on revenue of $5.96 billion. Evergy projects its full-year earnings to be between $4.14 and $4.34 per share.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Jennifer Weber Sells 25,000 Shares of Archer-Danie
feed.summary: Jennifer Weber, Senior Vice President at Archer-Daniels-Midland Co (ADM), sold 25,000 shares of the company on February 17, 2026, reducing her holdings to 123,668 shares. The transaction occurred when ADM shares were trading at $67.04, indicating the stock is modestly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.13, and a P/E ratio of 31.02 which is higher than the industry median.

feed.title: Bitcoin Depot Stock to Reverse Split on Monday, February 23rd (NASDAQ:BTM)
feed.summary: Bitcoin Depot (NASDAQ:BTM) announced a 1-for-7 reverse stock split effective Monday, February 23rd, with share adjustments occurring after the market close on Friday, February 20th. The company, which operates a large network of cryptocurrency kiosks, has a market capitalization of $69.22 million and a P/E of 4.13. Analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating on the stock with a target price of $5.83, despite recent downgrades from some firms.

feed.title: DT Midstream Earnings Call Signals Pipeline-Powered Growth
feed.summary: DT Midstream (DTM) reported record adjusted EBITDA of $1.138 billion for 2025, a 17% increase year-over-year, driven by its expanding pipeline segment which now accounts for 70% of its business. The company also increased its organic project backlog to $3.4 billion, largely focused on pipeline projects, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share, up 7.3%. Despite potential near-term risks from weather and regulatory approvals, DT Midstream projects continued growth, funded by strong cash generation and a strengthened balance sheet.

feed.summary: Michael Gallagher, the Chief Accounting Officer of Camden Property Trust (CPT), sold 169 shares of the company on February 18, 2026. This transaction leaves him with 39,640 shares. The stock is currently trading at $108.43, and with a GF Value of $112.07, it is considered fairly valued.

This transaction is part of a trend of 25 insider sells over the past year with no insider buys. The stock is currently trading at $279.16, making it significantly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 4.52, and its P/E ratio of 28.54 is higher than both the industry and company historical medians.

feed.title: GLPI Q4 Results: Revenue and FFO Beat Analyst Estimates | 2025 Report - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Gaming and Leisure Properties Inc. announced strong fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing analyst expectations for both funds from operations (FFO) and revenue. The real estate investment trust reported FFO of $290 million, or 99 cents per share, against an average estimate of 98 cents. Revenue reached $407 million, exceeding analyst forecasts of $405.1 million, with the company also providing positive FFO guidance for the coming year.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Lorenzo De Sells Shares of NetApp Inc (NTAP)

This transaction contributes to a trend of 1 insider buy and 27 insider sells over the past year for NetApp. The stock was trading at $101.84, and GuruFocus assesses it as "fairly valued" with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.94.

feed.title: How Larger Transactions Are Shaping M&A and Equity Trends
feed.summary: The article highlights that larger transactions were key to the M&A and equity market recovery in 2025, particularly in the fourth quarter. While the number of global equity transactions and M&A announcements decreased quarter over quarter, their total value increased, driven by significant deals, especially in the healthcare sector in the US. Although 2025's total transaction values for equity issuance and M&A grew year over year, equity issuance remained less than half of its 2021 peak, whereas M&A values were much closer to 2021 levels.

feed.title: Australia On Verge Of Winter Cruise Boom
feed.summary: Australia is poised for a winter cruise boom, as its mild climate and warm states are becoming increasingly attractive to cruise lines looking to deploy their expanding fleets during the northern hemisphere's off-season. Royal Caribbean Group is considering year-round sailings, and Regent Seven Seas will offer a three-month ultra-luxury winter season in 2027, indicating a significant shift from traditional seasonal cruising. This expansion promises substantial economic benefits for Australia, contingent on collaborative efforts between industry and government to address regulatory and infrastructure challenges.

feed.title: Samsung verifies 6G candidate-band antenna technology with KT, Keysight
feed.summary: Samsung Electronics, in collaboration with Korean telecom operator KT Corp. and U.S. electronics test equipment firm Keysight Technologies Inc., has successfully verified ultra-high-density antenna technology for future 6G networks. Through outdoor field tests, they achieved a peak downlink data rate of up to 3 gigabits per second (Gbps) in the 7 gigahertz (GHz) band using Xtreme multiple-input multiple-output (X-MIMO) technology. This development is expected to support 6G communication advancements, particularly in data-intensive sectors like artificial intelligence and extended reality.

feed.title: Michael Gallagher Sells 169 Shares of Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) Stock
feed.summary: Michael Gallagher, CAO of Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT), sold 169 shares of the company's stock on February 18th for a total of $18,324.67. This transaction reduced his stake by 0.42% to 39,640 shares. The sale follows Camden Property Trust's recent earnings report where it missed EPS estimates but announced a $600 million stock buyback program and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Encourages Apollo Global Management, Inc. Investors to Inquire About Securities Class Action Investigation – APO
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential securities claims against Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) following allegations that top executives consulted Jeffrey Epstein on the firm’s tax affairs, despite previous denials. This news led to a drop in Apollo's stock price, and the firm is now preparing a class action lawsuit to recover investor losses. Investors who purchased Apollo securities are encouraged to contact the Rosen Law Firm to inquire about joining the prospective class action.

feed.title: Buford Ortale Acquires 2,000 Shares of Franklin BSP Realty Trust (NYSE:FBRT) Stock
feed.summary: Director Buford Ortale recently acquired 2,000 shares of Franklin BSP Realty Trust (FBRT) stock, increasing his direct ownership to 49,851 shares. The company has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $13.50, despite an unsustainably high dividend payout ratio of 221.88%. Institutional investors have also been adjusting their stakes in FBRT.

feed.title: John Alexander Kelly Sells 8,149 Shares of Precision BioSciences (NASDAQ:DTIL) Stock

The article also notes significant institutional investment in Q4, mixed analyst ratings, and the company's current stock performance.

feed.title: Class Action Lawsuit Filed Against PayPal Holdings, Inc.
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm has filed a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal provided overly optimistic financial targets while concealing inadequacies in its salesforce, which misled investors and caused financial losses. The law firm operates on a contingency fee basis, inviting affected investors to apply as lead plaintiffs by April 20, 2026.

feed.title: Precision BioSciences (NASDAQ:DTIL) CEO Sells 20,559 Shares
feed.summary: Precision BioSciences CEO Michael Amoroso sold 20,559 shares of DTIL stock on February 18th for $78,946.56, reducing his stake by 7.79%. This sale, combined with a previous sale in January, totals 55,358 shares for approximately $224,058 in proceeds. The company's stock currently trades at $3.92, with analysts generally rating it as "Hold" and having a consensus price target of $60.00.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Home Bancorp (NASDAQ:HBCP) Director Buys 500 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Home Bancorp Director Chris Rader recently purchased 500 shares of the company's stock for $29,750, increasing his total holdings to 17,714 shares. This transaction comes as Home Bancorp reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings and announced a quarterly dividend. Analysts currently have a "Buy" rating on HBCP with a target price of $63.00.

feed.title: Pool construction underway at Luxor on Las Vegas Strip
feed.summary: Luxor hotel-casino on the Las Vegas Strip is undergoing a pool renovation, with crews demolishing the south pool to construct a new area with more deck space. MGM Resorts International did not provide a timeline or cost, but assured guests will have access to at least one pool during the remodel. This project is occurring during the colder months, in anticipation of warmer temperatures and pool season.

feed.title: Popular soda flavor returns as Keurig Dr Pepper rolls out 35 new drinks
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper is significantly expanding its beverage portfolio with over 35 new drinks across various brands, including carbonated soft drinks, teas, waters, juices, and energy drinks. Notably, the popular Dr Pepper Creamy Coconut flavor is returning to shelves due to consumer demand, alongside other new and returning flavors like A&W Root Beer Float and 7UP Shirley Temple. The company is focusing on evolving consumer preferences, such as the demand for zero-sugar options and innovative flavors.

feed.title: Ecolab Declares Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Ecolab Inc.'s board of directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.73 per common share. The dividend will be paid on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 17, 2026. Ecolab has a history of paying cash dividends on its common stock for 89 consecutive years.

feed.title: Archer Daniels Midland (NYSE:ADM) SVP Jennifer Weber Sells 25,000 Shares
feed.summary: Archer Daniels Midland SVP Jennifer Weber sold 25,000 shares of ADM stock for $1.676 million, reducing her stake by 16.82%. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.52 and reported mixed quarterly results with EPS beating estimates but revenue missing. Analysts currently have a "Reduce" rating on ADM with an average target price of $58.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Bradley Gabosch Sells Shares of Old Dominion Freig

feed.title: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) EVP Sells $1,200,000.00 in Stock

The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.27 per share, yielding approximately 3.3%. Phillips 66 reported Q4 EPS of $2.47, beating estimates, and analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $158.72.

feed.title: AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.73
feed.summary: AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.73 per share, payable on May 15th to shareholders of record on April 15th, representing a 3.1% yield. The company has a history of raising its dividend annually for 53 consecutive years and maintains a payout ratio of 49.5%. AbbVie recently beat quarterly EPS and revenue estimates and provided positive FY2026 guidance, though the stock saw a slight dip.

feed.title: Jack In The Box (JACK) Q1 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
feed.summary: Jack In The Box (JACK) reported Q1 2026 revenue of $349.52 million, a 25.6% year-over-year decrease and EPS of $1.00, down from $1.92 a year ago. While revenue beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 1.64%, EPS missed by 8.81%. The article also details various key metrics, including restaurant counts and same-store sales, comparing them against analyst estimates.

feed.title: Micron & 2 More Profitable Stocks to Buy Now for Big Gains
feed.summary: This article identifies Micron Technology (MU), Ralph Lauren Corporation (RL), and Modine Manufacturing Company (MOD) as top profitable stock picks. These companies were selected based on their high net income ratios and strong upside potential, along with meeting specific screening parameters including a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) and higher-than-industry sales and net income growth. The analysis emphasizes the importance of the net income ratio as a key indicator of a company's financial health and its ability to manage expenses effectively.

feed.title: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.30
feed.summary: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, payable on March 26th to shareholders of record on March 12th, representing a 3.6% yield and a sustainable payout ratio of 31.3%. The company reported mixed Q4 2025 results, with revenue beating estimates but EPS missing due to near-term restructuring costs. Despite a slightly conservative FY2026 guidance, LKQ has a strong cash flow and has initiated a strategic review to unlock shareholder value.

feed.title: Humana Inc. (NYSE:HUM) to Issue $0.89 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Humana Inc. (NYSE:HUM) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.885 per share, payable on April 24th to shareholders of record on March 27th, representing a 1.9% yield. The dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 24.1% and analysts projecting a future payout ratio of around 27%. The company recently beat earnings expectations with an EPS of ($3.96) and revenue of $32.64 billion, and has set FY2026 guidance at $9.00 EPS.
